sprints.name: MVP: Dipole + MoM + S11
sprints.description: Core simulation engine with half-wave dipole, basic MoM solver, and S11 visualization

tasks.title: Define core antenna data structures
tasks.description: Create AntennaConfig, SimulationResult, and AntennaTemplate structs in src-tauri/src/core/types.rs
acceptance_criteria: AntennaConfig struct supports dipole parameters (length, radius, frequency_range)
SimulationResult contains S11 complex values and frequency points
AntennaTemplate has name, description, and default parameters
All structs derive Serialize/Deserialize for Tauri IPC

tasks.title: Implement half-wave dipole geometry
tasks.description: Create dipole antenna geometry generation in src-tauri/src/core/antenna/dipole.rs
acceptance_criteria: Generate wire segments for dipole with configurable length and radius
Default half-wave dipole at 300 MHz produces 0.5m total length
Mesh contains at least 21 segments for convergence
Wire endpoints and segment centers calculated correctly

tasks.title: Implement basic MoM solver
tasks.description: Create Method of Moments impedance matrix solver in src-tauri/src/core/solver/mom.rs
acceptance_criteria: Calculate impedance matrix Z using thin-wire kernel
Solve Z * I = V for current distribution
Extract input impedance Z11 from current at feed point
Half-wave dipole at 300 MHz returns impedance within 10% of 73+j42.5 Ω

tasks.title: Add S-parameter extraction
tasks.description: Convert impedance to S11 parameters in src-tauri/src/core/solver/sparameters.rs
acceptance_criteria: Calculate S11 from impedance using S11 = (Z-Z0)/(Z+Z0) with Z0=50Ω
Return S11 magnitude in dB and phase in degrees
Frequency sweep from 200-400 MHz with 201 points
S11 minimum occurs near 300 MHz for half-wave dipole

tasks.title: Create Tauri command bridge
tasks.description: Implement Tauri IPC commands in src-tauri/src/bridge.rs
acceptance_criteria: simulate_antenna command accepts AntennaConfig and returns SimulationResult
get_antenna_templates returns Vec<AntennaTemplate> with dipole preset
Commands handle errors gracefully with proper error types
All commands compile and pass basic integration tests

tasks.title: Create antenna parameter form
tasks.description: Build AntennaForm component in src/components/AntennaForm.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Form inputs for antenna type, length, radius, frequency range
Dropdown for antenna templates with default values
Form validation for positive numbers and frequency ranges
TypeScript interfaces match core AntennaConfig struct

tasks.title: Implement S11 chart component
tasks.description: Create S11Chart component using Chart.js in src/components/S11Chart.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Line chart displays S11 magnitude (dB) vs frequency (MHz)
Y-axis range -40 to 0 dB with proper scaling
X-axis shows frequency range with grid lines
Chart updates when new simulation results received

tasks.title: Add Touchstone file import
tasks.description: Create TouchstoneImport component in src/components/TouchstoneImport.tsx
acceptance_criteria: File input accepts .s1p files
Parse Touchstone format (frequency, S11 real, S11 imag)
Convert to dB magnitude for chart overlay
Display imported data as second series on S11 chart

tasks.title: Create basic 3D dipole visualization
tasks.description: Implement DipoleModel component in src/viewport/models/DipoleModel.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Render dipole as cylindrical geometry with Three.js
Wire segments visible with proper length and radius
Feed point marked with different color
Model updates when antenna parameters change

tasks.title: Setup 3D viewport container
tasks.description: Create AntennaViewport component in src/viewport/AntennaViewport.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Three.js canvas with OrbitControls for rotation
Grid ground plane and coordinate axes
Ambient and directional lighting setup
Responsive canvas that fills container div

sprints.name: GPU Acceleration + Multi-Antenna
sprints.description: Add GPU-accelerated MoM solver and support for patch, QFH, and monopole antennas

tasks.title: Extend antenna geometry system
tasks.description: Add patch, QFH, and monopole antenna types to core geometry system
acceptance_criteria: PatchAntenna generates rectangular patch with ground plane
QFHAntenna generates quadrifilar helix geometry
MonopoleAntenna generates vertical wire over ground plane
All antenna types implement common AntennaGeometry trait

tasks.title: Implement GPU impedance matrix computation
tasks.description: Create wgpu compute shader for MoM impedance matrix in src-tauri/src/gpu/mom_compute.rs
acceptance_criteria: Compute shader calculates impedance matrix elements in parallel
GPU buffer management for wire segments and impedance matrix
Results match CPU MoM solver within 1% accuracy
Performance improvement of 5x+ over CPU for 1000+ segments

tasks.title: Add parallel frequency sweep
tasks.description: Implement parallel frequency sweep using rayon in src-tauri/src/gpu/frequency_sweep.rs
acceptance_criteria: Parallel processing of frequency points using rayon par_iter
Each frequency point runs independent MoM solution
Results aggregated into single SimulationResult
Frequency sweep 10x faster than sequential processing

tasks.title: Add antenna template system
tasks.description: Implement antenna templates with default parameters in src-tauri/src/core/templates.rs
acceptance_criteria: Templates for dipole, patch, QFH, monopole with realistic defaults
Template system supports parameter validation and ranges
get_antenna_templates Tauri command returns all available templates
Templates include frequency ranges and typical applications

tasks.title: Extend UI for multiple antenna types
tasks.description: Update AntennaForm to support all antenna types with dynamic parameter forms
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic form fields based on selected antenna type
Patch antenna form includes width, height, substrate parameters
QFH form includes turns, pitch, diameter parameters
Form validation specific to each antenna type

tasks.title: Add 3D models for all antenna types
tasks.description: Create 3D visualization components for patch, QFH, and monopole antennas
acceptance_criteria: PatchModel renders rectangular patch with substrate and ground plane
QFHModel renders helical wire structure with proper geometry
MonopoleModel renders vertical element over ground plane
All models scale correctly with parameter changes

sprints.name: Dataset Generation System
sprints.description: Automated dataset generation for AI training with parameter sweeps and batch simulation

tasks.title: Implement parameter sweep engine
tasks.description: Create parameter sweep system in src-tauri/src/core/sweep.rs
acceptance_criteria: ParameterSweep struct defines ranges for antenna parameters
Generate parameter combinations using Latin Hypercube Sampling
Support for linear, logarithmic, and custom parameter distributions
Batch simulation runner processes parameter sets sequentially

tasks.title: Add dataset export functionality
tasks.description: Implement dataset export to CSV/JSON formats in src-tauri/src/core/export.rs
acceptance_criteria: Export simulation results with input parameters and S11 data
CSV format: param1, param2, ..., freq1_s11_real, freq1_s11_imag, ...
JSON format with metadata (antenna type, frequency range, date)
Compressed export option for large datasets

tasks.title: Optimize batch simulation performance
tasks.description: Enhance GPU solver for batch processing in src-tauri/src/gpu/batch_solver.rs
acceptance_criteria: GPU memory reuse across multiple simulations
Batch impedance matrix computation for similar geometries
Progress tracking and cancellation support
Process 1000 dipole variations in under 10 minutes

tasks.title: Create dataset generation interface
tasks.description: Build DatasetGenerator component in src/components/DatasetGenerator.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Parameter range inputs for each antenna parameter
Sample count selection (100, 500, 1000, 5000)
Progress bar showing simulation completion
Export options and file save dialog

tasks.title: Setup dataset validation pipeline
tasks.description: Create dataset validation and preprocessing in python/dataset/validator.py
acceptance_criteria: Validate dataset completeness and format
Check for simulation convergence and outliers
Statistical analysis of parameter distributions
Data quality report with recommendations

sprints.name: AI Surrogate Model Training
sprints.description: Train neural network surrogate models on simulation datasets and export to ONNX

tasks.title: Implement neural network architecture
tasks.description: Create surrogate model architecture in python/models/surrogate_net.py
acceptance_criteria: Multi-layer perceptron with configurable hidden layers
Input: antenna parameters, Output: S11 real/imaginary parts
Support for different antenna types with shared architecture
Model achieves <5% mean absolute error on validation set

tasks.title: Create training pipeline
tasks.description: Implement model training workflow in python/training/trainer.py
acceptance_criteria: Data loading and preprocessing from CSV datasets
Train/validation/test split with proper shuffling
Hyperparameter optimization using Optuna
Training metrics logging and visualization

tasks.title: Add ONNX model export
tasks.description: Export trained models to ONNX format in python/export/onnx_exporter.py
acceptance_criteria: Convert PyTorch models to ONNX format
Validate ONNX model outputs match PyTorch predictions
Include model metadata (input/output shapes, antenna type)
Optimized ONNX models for inference performance

tasks.title: Setup FastAPI prediction server
tasks.description: Create REST API server in python/api/server.py
acceptance_criteria: POST /predict endpoint accepts antenna parameters
Load ONNX models for fast inference
GET /models endpoint lists available trained models
API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger

tasks.title: Integrate AI predictions in Tauri
tasks.description: Add AI prediction support in src-tauri/src/ai/predictor.rs
acceptance_criteria: HTTP client to communicate with FastAPI server
predict_antenna Tauri command for fast AI predictions
Fallback to MoM solver if AI server unavailable
Prediction results formatted as SimulationResult

tasks.title: Add AI prediction toggle
tasks.description: Update UI to support AI vs MoM simulation modes
acceptance_criteria: Toggle switch between 'AI Prediction' and 'Full Simulation'
AI predictions show results in <1 second
Confidence indicator for AI predictions
Option to run full MoM verification of AI results

sprints.name: Product Integration & Polish
sprints.description: Complete application integration with optimization, reporting, and project management

tasks.title: Implement main application layout
tasks.description: Create complete App.tsx with integrated layout and workflow
acceptance_criteria: Left sidebar: antenna selector and parameter forms
Center: 3D viewport with antenna visualization
Right panel: S11 chart, impedance table, VSWR display
Bottom status bar with simulation progress and AI server status

tasks.title: Add Touchstone export functionality
tasks.description: Implement export_touchstone Tauri command in src-tauri/src/core/export.rs
acceptance_criteria: Export simulation results to .s1p Touchstone format
Proper header with frequency units and parameter format
File dialog integration for save location
Exported files readable by standard RF tools

tasks.title: Add optimization algorithms
tasks.description: Implement antenna optimization using AI surrogate models
acceptance_criteria: Genetic algorithm optimization using AI predictions
Multi-objective optimization (S11, bandwidth, gain)
Optimization constraints and parameter bounds
Progress tracking and intermediate results

tasks.title: Create optimization interface
tasks.description: Build OptimizationPanel component with algorithm controls
acceptance_criteria: Objective function selection (minimize S11, maximize bandwidth)
Parameter bounds and constraints input
Real-time optimization progress with best candidates
Results table with Pareto front visualization

tasks.title: Add project save/load functionality
tasks.description: Implement project file management with .promin format
acceptance_criteria: Save complete project state (antenna, results, settings)
Load project files and restore application state
Recent projects menu and file associations
Auto-save functionality with recovery

tasks.title: Implement dark theme and polish
tasks.description: Apply consistent dark theme and UI polish throughout application
acceptance_criteria: Dark theme (bg-gray-900, text-white) applied consistently
Proper contrast ratios for accessibility
Smooth animations and transitions
Responsive layout for different screen sizes

tasks.title: Add comprehensive testing
tasks.description: Implement integration tests and performance benchmarks
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests for complete simulation workflow
Performance benchmarks for MoM solver accuracy
AI prediction accuracy tests against MoM ground truth
All tests pass with cargo test && npm test

tasks.title: Add field visualization
tasks.description: Implement electromagnetic field visualization in 3D viewport
acceptance_criteria: Near-field visualization with color-coded field strength
Radiation pattern overlay in 3D space
Animation controls for field propagation
Field data calculated from current distribution
